CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW groupbycourse AS select studentswithsession.id, studentswithsession.fullname, studentswithsession.email, studentswithsession.gender, studentswithsession.mobile_no, studentswithsession.age, studentswithsession.exam, studentswithsession.registered_course, studentswithsession.shortlist, studentswithsession.user_status, studentswithsession.user_registration_date, studentswithsession.user_updated_at, studentswithsession.userId, studentswithsession.card_type, studentswithsession.ghcard, studentswithsession.verification_date, studentswithsession.verified_by, studentswithsession.network_type, studentswithsession.exam_score, studentswithsession.exam_set, studentswithsession.confirmed, studentswithsession.submitted, studentswithsession.email_sent, studentswithsession.location, studentswithsession.session_id, studentswithsession.user_admission_status, studentswithsession.course_name, studentswithsession.course_location, studentswithsession.course_duration, studentswithsession.course_start_date, studentswithsession.course_end_date, studentswithsession.course_status, studentswithsession.centre_id, studentswithsession.programme_id, studentswithsession.session_name, studentswithsession.session_limit, studentswithsession.course_time, studentswithsession.session, studentswithsession.session_status, studentswithsession.whatsapp_link, studentswithsession.programme_name, studentswithsession.pprogramme_duration, studentswithsession.programme_start_date, studentswithsession.programme_end_date, studentswithsession.programme_status, studentswithsession.centre_name, studentswithsession.branch_id, studentswithsession.centre_status, studentswithsession.region_name, studentswithsession.branch_status, studentswithsession.admission_date from `studentswithsession` order by `studentswithsession`.`course_name` asc
